data.title: Typography system cleanup: explicit headings + consolidate/rename chrome utilities + DESIGN.md rewrite

data.body: Decisions made with the user. Type system is 3 tiers: Display (Fraunces: text-display/title/subtitle), Body (Inter: text-body/body-lead/aside), Chrome (JetBrains Mono = the non-content UI furniture: buttons, bars, labels, metadata, inputs, frames that let users control the software). Changes: (1) remove the global h1-h6 italic+uppercase rule; bare headings default to plain Fraunces FAMILY only (no forced italic/case/weight) as a safety net — note .font-serif itself carries uppercase+italic, so use the family directly, not @apply font-serif. Heading level stays decoupled from visual tier (level=a11y, tier=utility). (2) delete unused .display-roman (0 call sites). (3) collapse the 3 identical chrome aliases text-eyebrow/text-label/text-meta -> text-label (~21 call sites). (4) rename .text-control -> .text-input (now collision-free since --color-input was removed in FRAC-201; ~4 sites: Hero search + lab ArchiveSearch + sizing mirrors) and remove the obsolete --color-input naming comment. (5) rename .text-body-display -> .text-mono-display (~2 sites). (6) rewrite DESIGN.md Typography section around the 3-tier model, bake in the chrome definition, fix the 'Inter for labels' and 'mono is the body family' errors.

Cold review (independent sub-agent): PASS, no findings. No old names anywhere (grep zero). Critical heading rule verified: global h1-h6 italic/uppercase replaced by family-only font-family var(--font-serif), does NOT @apply font-serif (so .font-serif's uppercase+italic not re-added); zero bare headings exist so visuals unchanged. Renames byte-for-byte 1:1 vs master: .text-label == old eyebrow/label/meta rules; .text-input == old .text-control; .text-mono-display == old .text-body-display; call sites swap class not drop. No text-label duplicates. DESIGN.md accurate: Inter=Body, JetBrains Mono=Chrome (control-furniture def present), Fraunces=Display; old wrong claims removed; tables use new names matching CSS; display-roman + misplaced button line gone; button/house/color/layout untouched. Test update faithful (neighborhood.test text-eyebrow->text-label, not weakened). Gates: typecheck/build/conformance pass; tests 159 passed/7 failed (FRAC-199 set, no new). Move to done.
